# Elvenwood Interiors — Complete Business Information

> Factory-direct modular kitchens, wardrobes, and complete home interiors in Bangalore. 17,400 sq ft CNC factory in Bommasandra Industrial Area. Italian Biesse CNC machines, Century Ply BWP plywood, Hettich/Blum hardware. 28-45 day delivery, 10-year warranty. Rated 4.9/5 on Google.

## Company Overview

Elvenwood Interiors is a Bangalore-based interior design and manufacturing company that operates its own 17,400 sq ft factory in Bommasandra Industrial Area. Unlike showroom-based interior companies that outsource to carpenters, Elvenwood designs, manufactures, and installs all modular furniture in-house using Italian Biesse CNC machines.

The company serves homeowners across South and East Bangalore — from Electronic City to HSR Layout to Sarjapur Road. The factory is centrally located in Bommasandra, making it 5-15 minutes from most service areas.

### Key Differentiators
1. Own factory (17,400 sq ft) — not a showroom that subcontracts
2. Italian Biesse CNC machines — 0.1mm precision cutting
3. Century Ply BWP (Boiling Water Proof) plywood as standard — not an upsell
4. Hettich and Blum soft-close hardware from Germany
5. 28-45 day delivery from design approval to handover
6. 10-year warranty on all modular furniture
7. Factory-direct pricing — no middleman markup
8. Free 3D visualization before production
9. Free design consultation (no obligation)
10. Price lock guarantee — approved quote is final price

Sunday: Closed

## Detailed Pricing

### Modular Kitchen Pricing
| Type | Starting Price |
|------|---------------|
| Straight Kitchen | Rs 1,08,000 |
| L-Shaped Kitchen | Rs 1,96,000 |
| U-Shaped Kitchen | Rs 2,55,000 |
| Parallel Kitchen | Rs 3,20,000 |
| Island Kitchen | Rs 4,90,000 |

### Wardrobe Pricing
| Type | Starting Price |
|------|---------------|
| Laminate Finish | Rs 784/sq ft |
| Sliding Wardrobe | Rs 1,176/sq ft |
| Premium/Lacquer | Rs 1,960/sq ft |

### Complete Home Interior Pricing
| BHK | Essential | Classic | Premium |
|-----|-----------|---------|---------|
| 1 BHK | Rs 2,35,000 | Rs 3,80,000 | Rs 5,50,000 |
| 2 BHK | Rs 3,33,000 | Rs 5,80,000 | Rs 8,50,000 |
| 3 BHK | Rs 4,70,000 | Rs 7,90,000 | Rs 12,00,000 |
| 4 BHK | Rs 7,35,000 | Rs 11,00,000 | Rs 18,00,000 |

### Package Tier Details

**Essential — Rs 1,176/sq ft**
- Century Ply BWP plywood
- Laminate finish shutters
- Hettich soft-close hardware
- Basic handles and profiles
- 45-day delivery
- 10-year warranty

**Classic — Rs 1,764/sq ft**
- Century Ply BWP plywood
- Premium Greenlam/Merino laminates
- Hettich soft-close + tandem drawers
- Profile handles, glass shutters optional
- 3D design walkthrough
- 45-day delivery
- 10-year warranty

**Premium — Rs 2,940/sq ft**
- Century Ply BWP plywood
- Acrylic / PU / Lacquer finishes
- Blum LEGRABOX + lift-up systems
- Gola profiles, integrated lighting
- Full 3D walkthrough
- Priority 28-day delivery
- 10-year warranty

## Services

### Modular Furniture
- Modular Kitchens (Straight, L-Shape, U-Shape, Parallel, Island)
- Wardrobes (Hinged, Sliding, Walk-in)
- TV Units & Entertainment Walls
- Study Tables & Desks
- Bookshelves
- Shoe Racks
- Crockery Units
- Pooja Room Units
- Dressing Units
- Loft Storage
- Foyer & Entryway Storage

### Civil Work
- False Ceiling
- Painting
- Electrical Work
- Plumbing
- Flooring & Tiling
- Wallpaper
- Lighting Design

### Rooms We Design
- Master Bedroom
- Kids Bedroom
- Guest Bedroom
- Living Room
- Dining Room
- Home Office
- Bathroom Vanity
- Balcony

## Materials Used

| Category | Brand/Spec |
|----------|-----------|
| Plywood | Century Ply BWP (Boiling Water Proof) — standard on all tiers |
| Laminates | Greenlam, Merino — premium & textured finishes |
| Hardware | Hettich (Essential/Classic), Blum (Premium) — German soft-close |
| CNC Machines | Italian Biesse — 0.1mm precision cutting |
| Countertops | Granite (Essential), Quartz (Classic/Premium) |
| Finishes | Laminate, Acrylic, PU, Lacquer, Veneer options |
| Edge Banding | Moisture-resistant, humidity-proof for Bangalore climate |

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How much does a modular kitchen cost in Bangalore?
Modular kitchens at Elvenwood start from Rs 1.08 Lakh for a straight kitchen layout. L-shaped kitchens start from Rs 1.96 Lakh, U-shaped from Rs 2.55 Lakh, and island kitchens from Rs 4.90 Lakh. All prices are factory-direct with no middleman markup. Materials include Century Ply BWP plywood and Hettich soft-close hardware as standard.

### How much does a 2BHK interior cost in Bangalore?
A complete 2BHK interior starts from Rs 3.33 Lakh at the Essential tier, which includes a modular kitchen, two wardrobes, and a TV unit. The Classic tier starts from Rs 5.80 Lakh with premium laminates and upgraded hardware. Premium tier from Rs 8.50 Lakh with acrylic/lacquer finishes and Blum hardware.

### How much does a 3BHK interior cost in Bangalore?
A 3BHK complete interior starts from Rs 4.70 Lakh (Essential). This covers the kitchen, three wardrobes, TV unit, study area, and storage. Classic tier from Rs 7.90 Lakh, Premium from Rs 12 Lakh.

### What warranty does Elvenwood offer?
10-year warranty on all modular furniture — kitchens, wardrobes, TV units, and storage units. Covers manufacturing defects, hardware malfunctions, and structural integrity. BWP plywood and Hettich/Blum hardware are designed to last well beyond the warranty period.

### How long does interior design take?
28 to 45 days from design approval to handover. Elvenwood's in-house factory means zero dependency on third-party vendors. The handover date is locked before production begins.

### Can I visit the Elvenwood factory?
Yes. The 17,400 sq ft factory and Experience Centre in Bommasandra is open for tours Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 9 PM. No appointment needed. Visitors can see the CNC machines in action, touch material samples, and view finished display modules.

### Does Elvenwood offer EMI?
Yes, flexible EMI options are available for all interior projects. Free design consultation and 3D visualization are included before any commitment. No booking fee required to get started.

### What materials does Elvenwood use?
Century Ply BWP (Boiling Water Proof) plywood as standard on all tiers. Greenlam and Merino decorative laminates. Hettich (Essential/Classic) and Blum (Premium) soft-close hardware from Germany. All panels cut on Italian Biesse CNC machines for 0.1mm precision. No material substitutions.

## Company Credentials
- Google Rating: 4.9 out of 5 stars (127+ reviews)
- Factory Size: 17,400 sq ft
- On-time delivery record: 100% (8 out of 8 homes)
- Payment Methods: Cash, Credit Card, Debit Card, UPI, Bank Transfer, EMI
